benefits.description: Lost 64 pounds in 2024 with fasting, low cal/low carb, high protein diet and strength training prior to GLP use. Now stacking Tirz and Reta targeting a drop from current body fat to 15%.
Tirz provides strong appetite suppression; at 7.5mg and above gives tight appetite suppression, at 15mg causes forgetting about eating entirely

side_effects.description: Had some reaction to Sema, switched to Tirz

protocol_notes: Lost 64 lbs in 2024 without GLP medications. Suffered Achilles Tendonitis in 2025 which stalled progress. Started Sema but had a reaction, switched to Tirz. Currently stacking Tirz and Reta. Plans to discontinue Tirz by late March 2025 and escalate Reta to 8-10mg. Goal is to drop 26% body fat down to 15%, then return to Tirz for appetite suppression maintenance.
